title: Quadlet packaging fixes
body:
This fixes some minor packaging issues of quadlet in the rpm specfile.

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
Linter isn't happy
> pkg/systemd/quadlet/podmancmdline.go:12:10: var-declaration: should omit type string from declaration of var _binDir; it will be inferred from the right-hand side (revive)
	_binDir string = "/usr/bin"

> Error: reading blob sha256:5317f1bdda1424cde7cc72fba5f00990db96a82d065d6603e4bc99a64a84e34c: fetching blob: received unexpected HTTP status: 502 Bad Gateway

looks like a CI hickup
